mapper.sql: id, doc_id, kb_id, parent_id, chunk_type, content, content_vector, tsv, token_count, status, metadata, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO kb_chunk (doc_id, kb_id, parent_id, chunk_type, content, content_vector, token_count, status, metadata) VALUES (#{docId}, #{kbId}, #{parentId}, COALESCE(#{chunkType}, 'child'), #{content},
#{contentVector}::vector NULL , COALESCE(#{tokenCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{status}, 'draft'),
#{metadata}::jsonb NULL )

INSERT INTO kb_chunk (doc_id, kb_id, parent_id, chunk_type, content, content_vector, token_count, status, metadata) VALUES
(#{c.docId}, #{c.kbId}, #{c.parentId}, COALESCE(#{c.chunkType}, 'child'), #{c.content},
#{c.contentVector}::vector NULL , COALESCE(#{c.tokenCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{c.status}, 'draft'),
#{c.metadata}::jsonb NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_chunk SET content_vector = #{vector}::vector WHERE id = #{id}

update.foreach: UPDATE kb_chunk SET content_vector = #{c.contentVector}::vector, status = #{c.status} WHERE id = #{c.id}

mapper.update: UPDATE kb_chunk SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE kb_chunk SET parent_id = #{parentId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM kb_chunk WHERE doc_id = #{docId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN parent_id IS NULL THEN id ELSE parent_id END, id
SELECT FROM kb_chunk WHERE doc_id = #{docId} AND chunk_type = 'child' AND (status = 'draft' OR content_vector IS NULL) ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM kb_chunk WHERE id = #{parentId} AND chunk_type = 'parent'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kb_chunk WHERE doc_id = #{docId} AND chunk_type = 'child'
